topics.title: Kakutei Shinkoku (Final Tax Return)
topics.summary: Individual final return filed between 16 Feb – 15 Mar for the prior calendar year. Most salaried employees do not need to file — year-end adjustment (nenmatsu-chōsei) handles it.

topics.title: National + Inhabitant Tax
topics.summary: National income tax 5–45% progressive with deduction formula. Inhabitant tax ≈10% (prefectural 4% + municipal 6%) billed by local authority based on prior-year income.

topics.title: Reconstruction Surtax
topics.summary: 2.1% surtax on national income tax amount, applicable until 2037 for post-earthquake reconstruction funding.

topics.title: Consumption Tax
topics.summary: Standard 10%; reduced 8% on food and newspapers. Qualified Invoice System (tekikaku seikyūsho) required from Oct 2023 for input tax credit.

topics.title: Social Insurance (Shakai hoken)
topics.summary: Health + nursing + welfare pension + employment — combined employee share ≈15% (split roughly 50/50 with employer). Monthly withholding via payroll.
